case_title: COWEN, MICHAEL R. VS FONTAINE, MATTHEW MR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY COWEN, MICHAEL R. AS TO DEFENDANT FONTAINE, MATTHEW MR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COWEN, MICHAEL R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FONTAINE, MATTHEW MR $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,052.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
